---
title: '`syncweaver templates list`'
---

Print all workflow templates bundled with this version of syncweaver that can
be installed with [`syncweaver templates add`](add.qmd).

## Usage

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from ccbr_tools.shell import shell_run

help_text = shell_run("syncweaver templates list --help")
print("```")
print(help_text)
print("```")
```

## Examples

```sh
syncweaver templates list
```
